song.title: For All That You Have Done
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Your grace will never be forgot. Your mercy, all my life, Will be my soul's forever song, My story and my light.
[V2] 2) From mountain top to valley low, Through laughter and through tears, Surely the goodness of my God Will follow all the years.
[C] Chorus For all that You have done for us, For every battle won We'll raise a song to bless Your heart, For all that You have done.
[V3] 3) In all our failures and regrets, You've always led us home. Redemption's arm has raised us up, Our triumph in the storm.
[V4] 4) In unity we'll stand as one, As family we'll go Shoulder to shoulder, hand in hand Into the great unknown.
